outlook.summary: The market is heavily long gamma across all expirations, leading to strict localized volatility suppression. Spot is hovering just above the 0DTE Gamma Flip. Extreme Put/Call ratios and a bearish volatility skew indicate underlying fear, but dealer hedging flows will aggressively dampen any downside moves, creating a strong magnetic pull towards lower Call clusters like 690 and 680.

Highest single-strike Call OI in 0DTE (27,247). Dealers will aggressively buy the underlying to hedge if price approaches.
Absolute Put Wall with 135,626 OI. Ultimate safety net defining the bottom of the structural range.
